title: Yei Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Yei, with a Z-Score of +4.29. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Yei is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 14.0 GG. 
 The humidity level is relatively low at 38%, but the wind speed of 2.2 km/h is not sufficient to provide relief. 
 The heat wave is expected to continue, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded, indicating no relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
